description: Fortinet makes possible a digital world that we can always trust through its mission to protect people, devices, and data everywhere. This is why the world’s largest enterprises, service providers, and government organizations choose Fortinet to securely accelerate their digital journey.
description_enriched: Fortinet provides cybersecurity solutions and services for securing the entire digital attack surface from devices, data, apps, data center to home office. The company is B2B.
categories_and_keywords: web filtering and web security gateway

company_updates.description:
💬 Our customers said it best.

For three straight years, we've been recognized as a Gartner Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for Security Service Edge (SSE)—the only vendor to achieve this distinction.

This milestone reflects the trust our customers place in #Fortinet to simplify and secure their hybrid networks with industry-leading innovation and proven results.

📖 Discover why customers continue to choose Fortinet: https://ftnt.net/60477nk8b

60% Fewer Breaches. $1.6M Avoided Costs. 💰
 
The LAN edge is vulnerable to today’s threats. Forrester research found #Fortinet Secure LAN Edge helped organizations:
 
✅ Stop attacks earlier
✅ Strengthen visibility
✅ Avoid $1.6M in breach costs
 
Read the full study to see how converging networking and security delivered positive outcomes. https://ftnt.net/60457nDn7 👈

🎖️ This #VeteransDay, we recognize all who have served—and thank our #Fortinet Veterans partners across the globe for helping veterans and military spouses transition into cybersecurity careers.
 
Through training, certification, and career support, we're creating new opportunities and helping close the global #cybersecurity skills gap.
 
Learn how our Veterans Program is making an impact. 👉 https://ftnt.net/60407pFhM

🏆 Design excellence, recognized again.

We've once again earned the prestigious Red Dot Design Award for our #FortiGate Rugged Series (FGR-50G-5G and FGR-70G-5G), bringing:

✔️ Fanless, Rugged Design
✔️ Integrated 5G Connectivity
✔️ ASIC-driven Security at the Industrial Edge

Experience trusted security wherever reliability matters most.
🔗 Learn more: https://ftnt.net/60497pSvd #OTSecurity

AI is redefining secure access across hybrid environments. 🌐

In a new conversation with ISMG, our SVP of Products and Solutions, Nirav Shah shares how Unified #SASE is simplifying operations and strengthening protection across every edge.

🎙️ Interview: Information Security Media Group (ISMG) 
👉 Listen here: https://ftnt.net/60467TnL6

☁️ Securing access across every edge has never been more critical.

Join experts from #Fortinet and Google Cloud to discover how #FortiSASE on Google Cloud delivers unified, AI-driven protection and seamless connectivity—all in one cloud-delivered platform.

📅 Nov., 19 @ 10AM PST | 1PM EST
👉 Sign up today: https://ftnt.net/6049AhgzF

Your work doesn’t stop at email. ✉️
Neither should your defenses. 🛡️

#FortiMail Workspace Security extends protection across email, browsers, and collaboration tools—safeguarding users and data wherever work happens.

Discover how to stay secure without compromise.
👉 Learn more: https://ftnt.net/60447PnVo

#ZeroTrust Access made simple. 🔐

Learn how #Fortinet secures every user, device, and application—no matter where they connect from.

📲 Download our “Zero Trust Access For Dummies” guide: https://ftnt.net/60467OPzy

🗣️ Our customers have spoken!

Scoring highest for deployment experience in the 2025 Cloud WAAP Voice of the Customer, #Fortinet delivers easy and straightforward web application and API protection. No surprises, no manual workarounds, no overhead, no endless phone calls to the vendor. 

Get your app security going easily 👉 https://ftnt.net/604273CWw

Our CFO, Christiane Ohlgart shared strong Q3 results on our earnings call—driven by 14% billings and revenue growth, a record 37% Non-GAAP operating margin, and continued demand across all three business pillars. https://ftnt.net/604973MQL

#earnings $FTNT

Commissioner Hilde van der Meer from the Netherlands Foreign Investment Agency (NFIA) joined our COO, John Whittle to celebrate Fortinet's first European Distribution Center. We appreciate NFIA’s support in this investment, making Fortinet the first cybersecurity company to open a distribution center in the Netherlands as we continue investment across Europe. This partnership was commemorated by a signing ceremony at our US Headquarters.  
 
This strategic investment strengthens Fortinet’s ability to serve its ecosystem of distributors, partners, and customers, ensuring faster delivery times, improved product availability, and an enhanced service experience across the region.

Learn more: https://ftnt.net/604074hci

⚛️ Quantum computing is reshaping the future of #cybersecurity—and the time to prepare is now.

Join our #Fortinet experts to learn what quantum-safe security really means and how to start building a future-ready strategy today.

⏯️ Watch On-Demand
🔗 https://ftnt.net/604174z3T #QuantumComputing

🪡 Most #SASE offerings are stitched together. 
👉 The result? Complexity and inconsistent security.

Our Unified SASE solution takes a truly converged approach, built on one OS (#FortiOS) and a shared architecture that delivers consistent security and seamless performance across users, devices, and clouds.

See why convergence done right matters for hybrid work and cloud-first networks: https://ftnt.net/60497NmO1

Leading global cybersecurity agencies, including US’s CISA, UK's NCSC, and Canada’s CCCS, have released much-needed guidance outlining Principles for the Secure Integration of Artificial Intelligence in Operations Technologies (OT). 

#Fortinet is honored to have had the opportunity to contribute to this important effort as we collectively work to best safeguard OT environments from today and tomorrow’s threats.
company_updates.reshared_post_description:
📢 Attention Critical Infrastructure Owners and Operators! 

Check out these four NEW principles to help you navigate the complexities of AI integration into OT systems safely and securely.

✅Understand AI
✅Consider AI Use in the OT Domain
✅Establish AI Frameworks
✅Embed Safety & Security Practices

Developed with US and international partners, this joint guide describes how critical infrastructure organizations can safely and securely integrate AI into OT systems. 

These guidelines will help critical infrastructure owners and operators harness the benefits of AI while maintaining robust safety and security standards in their OT environments. Read more: go.dhs.gov/iXo

company_updates.description:
Another recognition! 📌

We're proud to be named a Challenger in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Email Security—this recognition we feel reflects our company's commitment to delivering strong price-to-performance with FortiMail Email and Workspace Security.

✔️ Flexible Deployment Options
✔️ Advanced Email Threat Detection
✔️ Integrated with the Fortinet Security Fabric

👉 Read the report and see how #Fortinet was recognized: https://ftnt.net/604072ZV0

Secured a major win in #SASE! 🏆

#FortiSASE has been recognized as the Overall Winner in CRN’s 2025 Products of the Year Awards, highlighting our continued commitment to delivering scalable, secure access across today’s hybrid environments.

👉 Read the full details: https://ftnt.net/604670lPa

🛡️ Detect. Disrupt. Investigate. Remediate.
Today’s threat landscape is too fast—and too complex—for siloed tools.

Our AI-Driven SOC Platform brings behavior-based detection, automation, and #GenAI together to help teams respond faster and reduce risk.

Discover a smarter way to stay ahead with #Fortinet: https://ftnt.net/60417It03 👈

Accountability is the missing piece in the fight against cybercrime.
📌 It’s time to change that.

ICYMI: We teamed up with Crime Stoppers International have launched the Cybercrime Bounty program, a first-of-its-kind global effort that empowers communities to anonymously report cyber threats and helps law enforcement turn those leads into real action.

A scalable model for global deterrence is here.
👉 Learn more: https://ftnt.net/60437IMVT

⚡️ The energy sector is under constant pressure to keep power flowing—from generation to transmission and distribution, every layer of the grid is a potential target.

🔋 Power & Utilities
🛢️ Oil & Gas
♻️ Renewable Energy

#Fortinet delivers in-depth defense designed specifically for energy operations that seamlessly integrates IT and OT protection to secure critical infrastructure, and maintain resilience.

Explore more: https://ftnt.net/60407t1wO #OTSecurity

Strengthening defense on—and off—the field. 🏈 🔒

When the Carolina Panthers needed a smarter, unified way to protect their most valuable data, they turned to #Fortinet Unified SASE, gaining clearer visibility and stronger protection everywhere their team works.

👉 Read the full story: https://ftnt.net/60447s9xr

Our CFO, Christiane Ohlgart shared strong Q3 results on our earnings call—driven by 14% billings and revenue growth, a record 37% Non-GAAP operating margin, and continued demand across all three business pillars. https://ftnt.net/604973MQL

#earnings $FTNT

Our Founder, Chairman of the Board, and CEO, Ken Xie, highlights #Fortinet’s continued momentum across all three pillars of our business—Secure Networking, Unified SASE, and AI-driven Secure Operations—during our Q3 earnings call. https://ftnt.net/604673zU8
 
#earnings $FTNT

We're proud to report our third quarter 2025 financial results. 📈
 
Full news release: https://ftnt.net/604273JEo
 
#Earnings $FTNT

The future of Secure AI infrastructure starts here. 📍
 
We just launched our Secure AI Data Center solution—the first end-to-end framework to protect AI models, data, and infrastructure at scale—built on our foundational ASIC-driven firewalls, including the 🆕 #FortiGate3800G, to meet the demands of modern AI workloads.
 
🔐 Unify performance, visibility, and security.
🔗 Full details: https://ftnt.net/60417MqV5

🚆 🚢 ✈️ Transportation and logistics are more connected than ever—with sensors, scanners, signage, and mobile devices expanding the attack surface.

#Fortinet delivers end-to-end #OTSecurity integration to keep shipping, rail, and maritime operations moving safely and efficiently.

🔗 Learn more: https://ftnt.net/60407zLEQ

Registration is open for #Accelerate2026! 🚀

Join us next year in Las Vegas for our largest premier customer and partner conference yet! Experience 5️⃣ days of innovation, strategy, and collaboration with #cybersecurity leaders from around the world.

✔️ Hear Keynotes from Fortinet Executives
✔️ Learn from Real Customer Success Stories
✔️ Connect with Partners and Peers

📍 March 9-13, 2026 | Mandalay Bay, LV
🔗 Secure your spot: https://ftnt.net/60467zlg0

#FortinetAccelerate #Accelerate26

The #CISO role is evolving, fast. As AI accelerates change, geopolitical tensions rise, and regulations tighten—CISOs face an unprecedented test in 2026.
 
#Fortinet's Dr Carl Windsor shares how AI, resilience, and leadership are shaping cyber strategy and driving organizational trust.
 
📖 Read more: https://ftnt.net/60407zVpi

Trust is the foundation of cybersecurity. 🤝

Check out the latest op-ed from #Fortinet's Derek Manky, exploring why responsible transparency isn’t just about vulnerability disclosure—It’s how we manage risk, communicate threats, and build processes that earn trust.

📑 Article: GTSC's Homeland Security Today 
🔗 Read more: https://ftnt.net/60477Kjs3

Unified. Intelligent. Built for OT. 🏗️

Our #OTSecurity Platform is designed for operational resilience, delivering end-to-end protection for industrial environments—without compromising uptime or performance.

Discover #cybersecurity engineered for industrial demands.
🔗 Learn more: https://ftnt.net/60427K80w

Web apps and APIs drive business—but they’re also prime targets for attack. 📲 ⚠️

#FortiAppSec Cloud delivers unified, AI-driven protection across hybrid and multi-cloud environments—simplifying security while boosting performance.

✅ WAF, API & bot defense in one platform
✅ AI-guided detection & response with FortiAI-Assist
✅ Available in AWS, Azure & Google Cloud

🔗 Learn more: https://ftnt.net/60447Gf0e via MES Computing

Firewalls aren’t what they used to be. 🛡️

#Fortinet Hybrid Mesh Firewalls unify protection across data centers, branches, and clouds—offering organizations consistency, visibility, and scale.

Discover why our #FortiGate HMFs are the future of firewall security: https://ftnt.net/6048AItYa 👈

🌍 Strengthening collective action against cybercrime.

As a founding member of the World Economic Forum Cybercrime Atlas, #Fortinet continues to help advance public-private collaboration—with partners like INTERPOL and AFRIPOL—to transform shared intelligence into coordinated disruption of cybercriminal networks worldwide.

Learn more in this blog from Derek Manky on how Fortinet is helping drive global cybercrime disruption in the 2025 Impact Report.

📖 Read here: https://ftnt.net/6049AIkWR

#AI is becoming increasingly central to digital transformation strategies, but a corresponding responsibility must match its potential.
 
Fortinet #CISO, Carl Windsor explores how AI governance frameworks help security leaders balance innovation, risk, and compliance while building trust in an AI-driven world.
 
📖 Read the full blog: https://ftnt.net/6049Ax14H

🔒 Complexity is the enemy of security—SASE changes that.

Hear from our Director of Product Marketing, SASE, Alexandra Mehat on why a Unified #SASE approach—and partnerships like #Fortinet & HCLTech—are key to reducing complexity and strengthening cyber resilience.

📃 Blog: HCLTech 
🔗 Read more: https://ftnt.net/6046At2aG

What is Secure SD-WAN? 💭

It’s more than connectivity—it’s networking and security convergence in one platform, offering:

🔹 High-performance SD-WAN, on-prem and in the cloud
🔹 Integrated NGFW, ZTNA, and advanced routing
🔹 Centralized visibility and orchestration

🔗 Discover how Fortinet Secure #SDWAN powers today’s hybrid workforce: https://ftnt.net/6043AtYCB

🛢️ Oil & gas organizations face risks at every stage of production—from exploration and drilling to refining and distribution. #Fortinet keeps petroleum operations resilient and secure from evolving threats, offering:

🔒 Integrated Security for Remote Sites
🛜 Secure Networking for Gas Retailers 
🔎 Complete Visibility and Control Across IT & OT Environments

Learn more 👉 https://ftnt.net/6048AsaYi #OTSecurity

🏆 We’re honored! Fortinet #WebApplicationSecurity has been named a 2025 Gartner Peer Insights™ Customers’ Choice for #CloudWAAP, earning a 4.8/5 rating and 99% willingness to recommend score!

👉 See why we believe organizations choose Fortinet: https://ftnt.net/6046AsnPj

This #CyberSecurityAwarenessMonth, rethink cloud security. ☁️ 🔐

Our 2025 State of Cloud Security Report revealed more than just threats:
🔹 76% of organizations were impacted by the cybersecurity skills gap
🔹 Human error and misconfigurations remain top causes of cloud breaches

Technology alone can’t secure the cloud—it takes awareness, training, and accountability.

👉 Read more: https://ftnt.net/6041ASXz1 #CloudSecurity

📚 As AI transforms security, the #cybersecurity skills gap is widening—more reason upskilling is essential.
 
Our 2025 Global Cybersecurity Skills Gap Report reveals how this shift is impacting security teams and boardrooms alike:
 
🤖 87% of professionals expect AI to enhance their roles
🚨 86% of organizations faced at least one breach last year
🏛️ 76% of boards are prioritizing cybersecurity 
 
Resilience starts with people—through training, certification, and awareness.
🔗 Read the full report: https://ftnt.net/6043Aq2lx

🤝 Stronger together: Fortinet + Armis

We've expanded our strategic partnership with Armis to help global organizations simplify security and strengthen cyber resilience. 8+ integrations now connect Armis Centrix™ with the Fortinet Security Fabric—providing:

✔️ Unified asset visibility and risk context
✔️ Automated policy enforcement at scale
✔️ Streamlined security programs across the modern attack surface

🔗 Full announcement details: https://ftnt.net/6040AU7Xn

We're honored to be named one of America’s Greatest Companies 2025 by Newsweek! ⭐
 
This recognition highlights #Fortinet’s commitment to innovation, financial strength, and a customer-first culture—driven by our incredible teams, partners, and customers.
 
👏 Thank you for making this possible.
🔗 https://ftnt.net/6040AwtQ8

☁️ The cloud brings speed, scale, and innovation—but also new risks.

Hear insights from our #Fortinet experts as they dive into the real-world challenges of hybrid and multi-cloud security, and share strategies to stay ahead of evolving threats.

🎙️ Host: Information Security Media Group (ISMG) 
🎧 Register today: https://ftnt.net/6048AYfWY

#CloudSecurity

☁️ Cloud security leadership, confirmed.

ICYMI: We've been recognized in the 2025 KuppingerCole Analysts CNAPP Compass Report for leadership across three categories:

🏆 Overall Leadership
🏆 Market Leadership
🏆 Innovation Leadership

This recognition validates how #FortiCNAPP drives digital transformation—strengthening our position as a trusted leader in cloud and network security.

🔗 Read the full report: https://ftnt.net/6043AYdNU

Is your digital workspace ready for the new battleground? 💻 🛡️

With AI-powered attacks and insider risks on the rise, organizations need smarter defenses to protect users and data across every channel.

Hear from our experts on how #FortiMail Workspace Security and #FortiDLP deliver AI-driven protection built for today’s hybrid environments.

📅 Wednesday, Oct 22 @ 10AM PT
🔗 Register today: https://ftnt.net/6044AiaLe

📣 Just in: #Fortinet FortiEDR has been certified in the 2025 AV-Comparatives Endpoint Prevention & Response test!

Why this matters 💭

Modern cyberattacks rarely follow a single path. They combine phishing, LOLBins, lateral movement, and data theft. The AV-Comparatives EPR test mirrors these realities—and #FortiEDR stood out by:

✅ Supporting legacy OS others ignore
✅ Reducing false positives and analyst workload
✅ Delivering one of the best TCO scores compared to competitors

🔗 See the full results: https://ftnt.net/6043AcXrb

#SASE adoption is no longer a question of if—it’s a question of how. 💭

The challenge? Many solutions promise convergence but deliver fragmented tools, inconsistent enforcement, and operational silos.

#Fortinet Unified SASE solves this with a single-vendor approach built on #FortiOS—bringing networking and security together for a unified architecture that scales with your business.

🔗 Explore our 5️⃣ steps to building a unified SASE strategy: https://ftnt.net/6042AiW4k

Don’t overlook the basics this #CybersecurityAwarenessMonth.
 
In 2025, cyberattacks have become more automated, opportunistic, and relentless. Yet our latest Global Threat Landscape Report confirms why two fundamentals remain critical:
 
🎣 Phishing Awareness
💻 Timely Software Updates
 
#Fortinet reinforces that security is everyone’s responsibility. Discover practical steps that close the most common doors attackers still rely on.
 
👉 Read more: https://ftnt.net/6044Aip7u

Backed by 15+ years of R&D and 500+ AI patents, #FortiAI gives organizations the security, automation, and visibility to harness AI—safely.

✅ Defend against known & unknown threats
✅ Automate SOC & NOC operations
✅ Safeguard AI models

With intelligence from 40M+ global sensors and seamless integration into our Fortinet #SecurityFabric, FortiAI delivers real-time insights at a scale no other vendor can match.

🔗 Learn more: https://ftnt.net/6045A9nAT

📈 Budgets are rising, but data is still slipping away. 

ICYMI: Our 2025 Data Security Report is out, revealing 41% of organizations lost millions to insider-driven incidents last year.

The issue isn’t spend—it’s outdated #DLP tools that lack behavior-aware visibility in SaaS, cloud, & AI.

🔗 Read the report: https://ftnt.net/6042A9DaM

Think a SOC is out of reach? Think again. 💭

On the latest Packet Pushers Heavy Networking podcast, #Fortinet's Max Zeumer breaks down what a modern SOC really looks like, and how our approach to #SecOps makes it accessible for more organizations.

🎙️ Host: Packet Pushers 
🎧 Listen now: https://ftnt.net/6048AgPoE

✅ Another recognition for #Fortinet!
 
We've been officially named a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Hybrid Mesh Firewall, placing highest in Ability to Execute.
 
Powered by #FortiOS, our firewalls unify appliance, virtual, and cloud-native deployments—converging networking and security while driving innovation with solutions like #FortiAI, integrated SOC, and post-quantum cryptography.
 
🔗 Read the full announcement: https://ftnt.net/6043fNQu1

🚨 Too many alerts. Too many tools. Not enough time.

That’s the reality for most security teams—manual workflows and siloed point solutions slow response and let threats slip through. #Fortinet AI-driven #SecOps changes that with a unified platform that:

✅ Reduces false positives by up to 80%
✅ Improves response times by 30%+
✅ Consolidates detection, automation & response

Discover a smarter approach to SecOps 👉 https://ftnt.net/6042A8Vve

🚀 The future of SASE is here. Are you ready?

Join us at our 4th Annual SASE Summit, where industry leaders and innovators will break down how to:
✨ Converge networking + security with AI
✨ Deliver seamless experiences for hybrid workforces
✨ Unlock the power of agentless access

Hear from experts at Gartner, Tepper Sports & Entertainment, FUNKE, and #Fortinet as they share real-world strategies and demos that you can put into action.

📅 September 16 – North America
📅 September 18 – EMEA, LATAM, APAC

👉 Save your spot: https://ftnt.net/6040ABw5y

From stadium to servers, Juventus Football Club relies on Fortinet for top performance. 🏟️ ✨ ⚽️

With our Security Fabric, the club protects its digital operations, manages threats efficiently, and keeps sensitive data safe—so they can focus on winning both on and off the pitch.

🔒 Learn how Fortinet helps world-class teams stay secure: https://ftnt.net/6047ABRrf

🚨 Overwhelmed teams. Endless alerts. Slowed response...
💭 Where do you start?

#FortiAI flips the script—automating detection, accelerating response, and strengthening cyber resilience, so SOCs and NOCs can focus on the work that matters most.

🔗 Learn more: https://ftnt.net/6049A6ZAN

☁️ From code to runtime, cloud-native workloads demand security built for speed, scale, and flexibility. #FortiCNAPP unifies cloud security into one platform—helping organizations:

✅ Detect risks in code before deployment
✅ Continuously monitor & enforce cloud posture
✅ Protect workloads & APIs at runtime with AI-driven detection

👉 Learn how to secure every stage of the app lifecycle: https://ftnt.net/6047A6zfL

🌎 👩💻 #Fortinet honors International Women in Cyber Day 2025—a global movement recognizing women’s contributions in #cybersecurity and spotlighting pathways to help more women build cyber careers.

Through accessible training, certifications, and partnerships with organizations like Women in CyberSecurity (WiCyS), we’re working to empower diverse professionals and expand opportunities for all. 🤝

Learn more about how the Fortinet Training Institute’s Education Outreach program is helping build a more resilient cyber workforce.
🔗 https://ftnt.net/6045fhmVU

The #SASE market feels crowded—but truth is most solutions fall short.

Fragmented offerings stitched from point products equate to complex management, inconsistent enforcement, and higher costs. #Fortinet Unified SASE delivers the full promise of convergence:

✅ One OS, one agent, one console
✅ Networking & Security in a single architecture
✅ AI/ML-driven threat detection

👉 Discover true convergence: https://ftnt.net/6047fAp2S

When scale meets security, FortiSASE delivers. 💪

Brazil’s Attorney General’s Office, AGU - Advocacia-Geral da União, transformed security with Fortinet—protecting 14,000 employees, cutting costs by R$1.5M/year, and doubling WAN performance.

🔗 See how #FortiSASE turned complexity into efficiency: https://ftnt.net/6045fADd7

🧭 Navigate the future of secure access with Gartner.

Jonathan Forest, VP Analyst at Gartner, is set to kick off our 4th annual virtual SASE Summit with a keynote that will reveal critical insights into the convergence of networking and security.

Hear insights on:
🔒 Universal ZTNA & the future of secure access
📊 Vendor consolidation & unified platforms
🚀 Key SASE trends shaping tomorrow's digital infrastructure

Reserve your spot now!
📍 Sep 16, 2025 — North America
🌍 Sep 18, 2025 — EMEA / LATAM / APAC

🔗 https://ftnt.net/6040ffGtA

We're proud to report our second quarter 2025 financial results. 📈

Read the news release: https://ftnt.net/6047f90mv

#earnings $FTNT

🌍 Cybercrime knows no borders—neither should the fight against it.
